idea: An AI workspace that turns customer success call notes into churn-risk actions for small SaaS teams.
expected_risky_assumptions: customer success teams trust AI risk summaries
small SaaS teams will pay for a focused workspace
unacceptable_claims: build before validating willingness to pay

idea: A habit coaching app for new parents that adapts routines around fragmented sleep and childcare schedules.
expected_risky_assumptions: new parents have bandwidth for another app
behavior change remains valuable during fragmented sleep
required_output_sections: What We Still Do Not Know

idea: A CI assistant that explains flaky tests, suggests fixes, and tracks recurring failure patterns.
expected_risky_assumptions: developers will trust suggested fixes
teams will grant CI and code access

idea: An AI platform for independent fitness coaches that turns client check-ins into adaptive recommendations.
expected_risky_assumptions: coaches will trust AI-assisted recommendations
coaches spend enough time on check-ins to pay
unacceptable_claims: autonomous coaching should replace the coach

idea: A scheduling and quote follow-up assistant for independent home service contractors.
expected_risky_assumptions: contractors will adopt software for follow-up
text and phone workflows can be improved without disrupting jobs

idea: A managed marketplace connecting boutique accounting firms with startups that need cleanup bookkeeping.
expected_risky_assumptions: both sides can be acquired cheaply
quality control is manageable in a managed marketplace
required_output_sections: What We Still Do Not Know

idea: A strategic research workspace that investigates startup ideas and recommends validation experiments.
expected_risky_assumptions: stateful memory is valuable enough to switch from chat
citations increase trust enough to pay

idea: A personal operating system that turns meeting notes, tasks, and calendar events into weekly priorities.
expected_risky_assumptions: users will change weekly planning habits
calendar and task incumbents leave a clear wedge
unacceptable_claims: calendar and task incumbents are irrelevant

idea: A sponsorship pipeline assistant for niche newsletter creators and solo consultants.
expected_risky_assumptions: creators will pay before sponsorship revenue is predictable
pipeline automation beats spreadsheets and inbox workflows
unacceptable_claims: existing newsletter platforms do not matter

idea: A shopping research assistant for runners choosing shoes based on injury history and training volume.
expected_risky_assumptions: users trust recommendations despite affiliate incentives
medical-adjacent guidance can be framed safely
unacceptable_claims: affiliate bias does not affect trust
